summary: Wire the M4 thumbnail capture path through accepted viewer renders, platform-owned persistence, and Welcome recent-project presentation.

decisions.decision: Capture only after the viewer has accepted and rendered the current result identity; deduplicate by renderIdentity so stale, failed, and repeated animation frames cannot overwrite a newer thumbnail.
decisions.rationale: The viewer can retain geometry continuity across renders and can repaint repeatedly. Identity-gated post-frame capture prevents old scene bytes from being attributed to a new result.

decisions.decision: Expose one thumbnail persistence port on ScadMillPlatform and WorkbenchRuntime; desktop uses opaque profile storage and web/tests use an ephemeral fail-safe implementation until a browser durable adapter is selected.
decisions.rationale: Derived thumbnails must not enter project source or portability archives, and an unavailable profile must not block editing or opening a project.

decisions.decision: Welcome loads the newest available thumbnail defensively and renders it as a decorative preview beside the recent-project action; malformed or unavailable records are ignored.
decisions.rationale: Recent-project recovery remains usable even when profile-derived media is unavailable, while the preview provides immediate visual orientation.

testEvidence.criterion: Viewer, platform, and Welcome surfaces remain type-correct after thumbnail capture integration.

red.outcome: RED: test platform fixtures lacked the newly required renderThumbnails port.

green.outcome: GREEN: tsc exited 0 with no diagnostics.

testEvidence.criterion: Existing viewer, Welcome, runtime, and platform behavior remains green with the new optional capture callbacks and decorative recent previews.
testEvidence.test: Run the affected UI/runtime suite once.

red.outcome: RED: sharing engine-version promises without the configured-path key suppressed expected path-change probes; the bounded retry exposed three App assertions.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/app/App.test.tsx tests/application/runtime/workbench-runtime.test.ts tests/ui/Workbench.test.tsx tests/ui/welcome/WelcomeLauncher.test.tsx tests/ui/viewer/SvgViewer.test.tsx tests/ui/viewer/ModelViewer.test.tsx tests/ui/viewer/ViewerPane.test.tsx tests/ui/viewer/ViewerPaneConnector.test.tsx tests/platform-web/web-platform.test.ts tests/platform-desktop/desktop-platform.test.ts
green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 9 passed (9); Tests 98 passed (98); Duration 4.89s.

nearMisses.sought: Clean-host native timing and full browser walkthrough evidence for thumbnail persistence and capture.
nearMisses.confirmation: Not claimed in this local integration unit; the M4 exit gate still requires the clean-host/native and walkthrough evidence lanes.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
